anyOf.description: Source and target use the same relative path.

ignore.description: Source-relative path patterns that copy should skip.

ignore_metadata.description: Metadata fields that copy should not compare or apply.

include.description:
Source-relative path patterns that narrow directory copies to
matching source paths.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

symlinks.description: How safe source symlinks are handled.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

allow_failure.description: Whether a non-zero exit status should be non-fatal.

cwd.description: Command working directory, relative to the worktree unless absolute.

env.description: Extra environment variables for this command.

oneOf.description: Copy object entry for mixed `files` and `[[file]]` declarations.

ignore.description: Source-relative path patterns that copy should skip.

ignore_metadata.description: Metadata fields that copy should not compare or apply.

include.description:
Source-relative path patterns that narrow directory copies to
matching source paths.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

symlinks.description: How safe source symlinks are handled.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

oneOf.description: Symlink object entry for mixed `files` and `[[file]]` declarations.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

oneOf.description: Sync object entry for mixed `files` and `[[file]]` declarations.

delete.description: Whether target-only files are deleted for directory sync.

ignore.description: Source-relative path patterns that sync should skip.

ignore_metadata.description: Metadata fields that sync should not compare or apply.

include.description:
Source-relative path patterns that narrow directory sync to
matching source paths. A non-empty list cannot combine with
`delete = true`.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

symlinks.description: How safe source symlinks are handled.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

allow_failure.description: Whether a non-zero exit status should be non-fatal.

cwd.description: Command working directory, relative to the worktree unless absolute.

env.description: Extra environment variables for this command.

anyOf.description: Source and target use the same relative path.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

anyOf.description: Source and target use the same relative path.

delete.description: Whether target-only files are deleted for directory sync.

ignore.description: Source-relative path patterns that sync should skip.

ignore_metadata.description: Metadata fields that sync should not compare or apply.

include.description:
Source-relative path patterns that narrow directory sync to matching
source paths. A non-empty list cannot combine with `delete = true`.

required.description: Whether a missing source should fail validation.

source.description: Source path, relative to the root checkout unless absolute.

symlinks.description: How safe source symlinks are handled.

target.description: Target path, relative to the current worktree unless absolute.

command.description: Verbose command entries. TOML uses this as [[command]].

commands.description: Command entries. Entries run before verbose [[command]] entries.

copy.description: Copy file entries. Entries run before symlink, sync, files, and file.

dangerously_allow_sources_outside_root.description: Allows file operation sources outside the root checkout.

dangerously_allow_targets_outside_worktr.description: Allows file operation targets outside the current worktree.

default_ignore.description: Default path ignore patterns prepended to copy and sync operations.

file.description: Verbose mixed file operation entries. TOML uses this as [[file]].

files.description: Mixed file operation entries. Entries run after copy, symlink, and sync.

strict.description: Enables strict declarative validation and conflict handling.

symlink.description: Symlink file entries. Entries run after copy and before sync.

sync.description: Sync file entries. Entries run after symlink and before files.
